title: Run K-fold cross-validated MNL fits and finalize all folds in one call
summary: Combines `cv-fit` and `cv-finalize` into a single command: runs MNL fits across all folds in a `choice-cv split` directory, then immediately finalizes each fold and writes the aggregate CV summary. Emits a single started / finished event pair.
description: Walks a `choice-cv split` directory (one subdirectory per fold, each containing `train.csv` and `test.csv`) and runs an MNL fit on every fold, then immediately finalizes each fold to produce per-fold exports. After all folds complete, writes `cv_summary.csv` and `cv_summary.json` at the top of `run_dir`. Equivalent to calling `cv-fit` then `cv-finalize` back-to-back, but in a single protocol invocation.
usage:
[["model-mnl-lg::cv-fit-finalize"]]
folds_dir = "<cv-folds dir>"
run_dir = "<output dir>"
run_name = "lg_run"
# optional:
iterations = 500
threads = 1

arguments.name: folds_dir
arguments.description: Directory containing per-fold subdirectories. Each subdirectory must contain `train.csv` and `test.csv` files in coded long format.

arguments.name: run_dir
arguments.description: Output directory. Created if it does not exist. Each fold gets its own subdirectory, and `cv_summary.csv` plus `cv_summary.json` are written at the top level.

arguments.name: run_name
arguments.description: Short identifier for this run. Non-empty string. Used to name output artifacts and subdirectories so multiple runs under the same run_dir do not collide. Must not contain path separators or '..'.

arguments.name: export_dir
arguments.description: Where to write per-fold CSV exports. Defaults to `{run_dir}/{fold_id}/exports`.

arguments.name: headers
arguments.description: Whether the per-fold CSVs have a header row. Default `true`.

arguments.name: iterations
arguments.description: Maximum optimizer iterations per fold. Default `500`.

arguments.name: gradient_threshold
arguments.description: Gradient norm threshold per fold. Default `1e-8`.

arguments.name: vcov_ridge
arguments.description: Ridge added to the Hessian before inversion. Default `0.0`. Applied uniformly across folds.

arguments.name: threads
arguments.description: Number of threads per fold. Default `1`.

details: `cv-fit-finalize` runs the complete MNL cross-validation pipeline in a single call. Each fold is fit and immediately finalized before moving to the next fold. The aggregate CV summary is written after all folds complete. The raw per-fold fit state is persisted exactly as it would be from a standalone `cv-fit` call, so you can still run `cv-finalize` separately if needed.
value:
On success, `run_dir` contains:

- One subdirectory per fold, each containing the fit state and the finalized exports.
- `cv_summary.csv` and `cv_summary.json` at the top level: per-fold and aggregate train / holdout log-likelihood.

In protocol mode the plugin emits a single `event.run.started`, then `event.run.finished` (or `event.run.failed`) carrying the aggregate summary.
notes: Equivalent to calling `cv-fit` then `cv-finalize` with the same `run_dir`.
Use `cv-fit` + `cv-finalize` as separate calls if you need to finalize with different settings.

see_also.description: Produces the per-fold directory layout this command consumes.

fields.name: folds_dir
fields.description: Directory containing per-fold subdirs (each with train.csv + test.csv).

fields.name: run_dir
fields.description: Output directory. Per-fold subdirs and cv_summary.csv are written here.

fields.name: run_name
fields.description: Short identifier for this run. Non-empty string. Used to name output artifacts and subdirectories so multiple runs under the same run_dir do not collide. Must not contain path separators or '..'.

fields.name: export_dir
fields.description: Where to write per-fold CSV exports. Defaults to {fold_dir}/exports.

fields.name: headers
fields.description: Whether CSVs have a header row. Default: true.

fields.name: iterations
fields.description: Maximum optimizer iterations per fold. Default: 500.

fields.name: gradient_threshold
fields.description: Gradient norm threshold per fold. Default: 1e-8.

fields.name: vcov_ridge
fields.description: Ridge added to Hessian before inversion. Default: 0.0.

fields.name: threads
fields.description: Number of threads per fold. Default: 1.
